title: GitMutationError
description: A refused local Git mutation, serialized as `opensks.git-error.v1`.

GitMutationErrorBody.description: The inner error object carried by [`GitMutationError`].

GitMutationErrorCode.description: A machine-readable code for a refused mutation.

oneOf.description: A switch was blocked by a dirty worktree or conflict and `--force` was not supplied. Carries the blockers.
The live index hash no longer matches the expected hash from a preview; the preview is stale and the commit is refused.
A staged path is secret-looking or a data-plane path; the commit is refused rather than publishing restricted content.
Nothing is staged, so there is nothing to commit.

GitSwitchBlocker.description: One reason a branch switch is blocked, with the workspace-relative paths that triggered it.

GitSwitchBlockerKind.description: Why a switch cannot proceed: the worktree is dirty, or there is an unresolved merge conflict.

oneOf.description: The worktree has uncommitted tracked changes (staged or unstaged) that a switch would overwrite.
There is at least one unresolved merge conflict.
